message:
🐛 Fix cards not showing refresh animation and stuck on skeleton (#474)

- CardWrapper: Listen to context-reported isRefreshing in addition to prop
  for refresh animation (cards report via useCardLoadingState → context)
- HelmHistory hook: Set isLoading: false when no release selected
  (was staying stuck at true causing infinite skeleton)
- HelmHistory card: Treat "no selection" as having data to show selectors
  instead of empty state

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
